$schema: internal: PQC support status for libraries listed in the JOSE protocol-matrix row
source: manual transcription from each library's CHANGELOG / release notes (refresh via scripts/audit-jose-matrix.ts)

nimbus-jose-jwt.name: Nimbus JOSE+JWT
nimbus-jose-jwt.notes: Marketing page acknowledges a draft-ietf-jose-pqc-kem contribution from MONET+, but the released 11.0 CHANGELOG mentions no PQC algorithms. Java-only.

bouncy-castle-java.name: Bouncy Castle Java
bouncy-castle-java.notes: Ships raw PQC primitives (ML-DSA / ML-KEM / SLH-DSA) as JCA providers, but no JOSE adapter is included. Pairs with Nimbus or jose4j for JWS framing — neither of which currently exposes the BC PQC providers as JOSE alg codes.

jose4j.name: jose4j
jose4j.notes: Pluggable via JCA; could in principle delegate PQC sign/verify to a BC provider, but no first-class alg codes wired up.

go-jose-v4.name: go-jose v4
go-jose-v4.notes: Classical only; no open PR for cose-dilithium alg codes.

pyjwt.name: PyJWT
pyjwt.notes: Classical only; depends on cryptography lib which exposes some PQC but PyJWT has not registered the alg codes.

noble-post-quantum.name: @noble/post-quantum
noble-post-quantum.notes: Provides raw sign/verify/encapsulate/decapsulate for ML-DSA, ML-KEM, SLH-DSA, Falcon. JOSE framing is hand-rolled by the consumer (see this workshop). Pure JS, audited, MIT — fits browser SPA stack natively.

panva-jose.name: panva/jose (npm jose)
panva-jose.notes: ML-DSA support landed via PR #816 with AKP key type, but the implementation requires Node 24.7+ or browser WebCrypto PQC primitives — the latter has not shipped in Chrome/Firefox as of 2026-05-16.
